_comment: Source of truth for output types + multipliers. Keep in sync with SWITCH() in Setup.js:updateMultiplierFormulas() and the Google Form dropdown.

outputTypes.label: Sponsorship Secured
outputTypes.m3Notes: URL to signed deal or Stripe sponsorship checkout

outputTypes.label: Bounty Completed
outputTypes.m3Notes: M3 — link to bounty claim in dashboard; requires steward approval before $ROAD releases

outputTypes.label: Code Shipped
outputTypes.m3Notes: URL to PR, commit, or deployed feature

outputTypes.label: Research Published
outputTypes.m3Notes: URL to published or shared research

outputTypes.label: Peer Review
outputTypes.m3Notes: M3 — reviewing another member's submission or bounty claim

tierThresholds._note: Ops tiers (col H) are score-based. Subscription tiers (col R) are Stripe-based. They are independent.

subscriptionTiers._note: Monthly $ROAD base accrual by Stripe subscription tier (col R). Activity accrual (score × roadConversion) is separate.

roadConversion._note: Activity stream: 10 score points = 1 $ROAD. Separate from the subscription base accrual above.
